title: HPD-Parsing: Hierarchical Parallel Document Parsing
innovation_summary: HPD-Parsing: Hierarchical Parallel Document Parsing: Based on this observation, we introduce HPD-Parsing, which replaces full-page autoregressive generation with a Hierarchical Parallel Decoding paradigm.
